ach_routing_number.description: The routing number used for US ACH payments. Only appears if `bank_countries` contains `US`. Value may be masked, in which case only the last four digits are returned.

bank_countries.description: The countries that this bank operates the account in

bank_name.description: The name of the bank managing the account

eft_routing_number.description: The routing number used for EFT payments, identifying a Canadian bank, consisting of the institution number and the branch number. Only appears if `bank_countries` contains `CA`. Value may be masked, in which case only the last four digits are returned.

swift_code.description: The SWIFT code for the bank. Value may be masked, in which case only the last four characters are returned.

wire_routing_number.description: The routing number used for domestic wire payments. Only appears if `bank_countries` contains `US`. Value may be masked, in which case only the last four digits are returned.
